svg.text: Always open @Orchestrator in a new session — what changes is what you ATTACH and what you SAY
A broken feature or reported error
PRD file + "I have a PRD, skip to architecture"
E — Has Full Plan ★ Current session
A brief or just a project concept
Feature but no visual spec or wireframe yet
Unclear error needing root cause analysis
Reads pipeline-state.json · Detects scenario · Validates artefacts
Sets supervision gates · Routes to correct first agent
Never skip @Orchestrator — it is the only agent that creates and tracks pipeline state
Always open in a NEW session (new chat window)
A, B, F, H — Orchestrator creates automatically
New idea / New project (A/F) "I want to add [feature] to [app]"
UI/UX design needed (G) attach brief + "Design the UI for [feature] first"
Resume mid-run "Phase N complete, resume the pipeline for [feature]"
